# Gridfinity Label Generator - Professional Labels for Your Storage System

## What is this?

I built this free web tool to solve a problem I had with my Gridfinity workshop organization - labeling bins with fasteners was tedious and inconsistent. So I created an app that generates professional labels optimized for **label printers like Brother P-touch and DYMO**.

It handles screws, bolts, nuts, washers with automatic hardware type detection, proper ISO/DIN standard references, and optional QR codes. Plus simple text labels for everything else in your workshop - electronics, tools, 3D printer parts, you name it.

Just open it in your browser, design your label, and print. No installation, no signup.

## Key Features

**Smart Hardware Labels**

- Automatic detection for screws, bolts, nuts, washers, and more
- Intelligent formatting of thread sizes (metric/imperial)
- Visual icons for **140+ ISO/DIN standards** (ISO 4014-4018, DIN 912-985, and many more)
- Hardware images for quick visual identification

**General Purpose Labels**

- Create custom text labels for any other workshop items
- Upload your own images for personalized labels (12mm tape)
- Works for electronics, tools, 3D printer parts, craft supplies, and more

**Batch Mode**

- Generate multiple labels at once
- Configure each label individually
- Export all labels in one go

**Professional Output**

- Real-time preview as you design
- Export to high-quality PNG files
- **Support for 9mm and 12mm label tape widths** (compatible with Brother P-touch and similar printers)
- Optional QR codes for digital inventory systems

**Easy to Use**

- Clean, intuitive interface
- Web-based - no installation required
- No account or signup required
- Works offline after first load

## Perfect For

- **Workshop Organization** - Sort your collection of screws, bolts, nuts, and washers with proper technical specifications
- **Electronics Lab** - Label resistors, capacitors, connectors, and components
- **3D Printing Station** - Organize nozzles, hotend parts, belts, and accessories
- **Garage/Maker Space** - Create a complete inventory system with optional QR codes
- **Tool Storage** - Quick identification of drill bits, taps, dies, and specialty tools

## Get Started

**🔗 Try it now:** https://gridfinitylabels.com

No installation, no signup - just open and create your first label in under a minute.
